mapper.sql: id, code, name, owner_user_id, status, default_locale, default_timezone, data_classification_policy_id, revision, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT w.id, w.code, w.name, w.owner_user_id, w.status, w.default_locale, w.default_timezone, w.data_classification_policy_id, w.revision, w.created_at, w.updated_at FROM pdp_workspace w WHERE w.status != 'ARCHIVED' AND ( w.owner_user_id = #{userId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pdp_workspace_membership m WHERE m.workspace_id = w.id AND m.user_id = #{userId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND m.status = 'ACTIVE' AND m.valid_from <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) AND (m.valid_until IS NULL OR m.valid_until > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)) ) ) ORDER BY w.code, w.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pdp_workspace ( id, code, name, owner_user_id, status, default_locale, default_timezone, data_classification_policy_id, revision, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{code}, #{name}, #{ownerUserId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{status}, #{defaultLocale}, #{defaultTimezone}, #{dataClassificationPolicyId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{revision}, #{createdAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler}, #{updatedAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler} )
mapper.update: UPDATE pdp_workspace SET name = #{name}, owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, status = #{status}, default_locale = #{defaultLocale}, default_timezone = #{defaultTimezone}, data_classification_policy_id = #{dataClassificationPolicyId,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, revision = #{revision}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.InstantUtcTypeHandler} WHERE id = #{id,typeHandler=com.pdp.mysql.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{revision} - 1
